title: saussurea deltoidea
intro: Saussurea deltoidea, also known as Kuth or Kutki, is a perennial plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as showing potential in reducing stress and anxiety levels. In herbal preparations, Saussurea deltoidea is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, capsules, or powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
